# kSecAttrCanWrap

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a Boolean that indicates whether the cryptographic key can be used for wrapping.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrCanWrap: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean] and indicates whether this cryptographic key can be used to wrap another key.

On key creation, if not explicitly specified, this attribute defaults to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanFalse] for private keys and [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue] for public keys.
title: kSecAttrCanWrap
